title: Biaora Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Biaora with a Z-Score of +5.46. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Biaora has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is extremely high, with a cooling degree day (CDD) value of 18.1 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is 21% and the wind speed is 12.1 km/h, which may exacerbate the heat wave's impact.
